name: Eye of the Moonwarden
description:
This beaded pendant crafted by Lyrune-Quah shamans features an uncut moonstone that warns the wearer of danger. When a hostile creature comes within 30 feet of you, the stone glows with moonlight only you can see.

Activate—Lunar Illumination (1 Action) (concentrate)

Frequency once per hour

Effect Bright moonlight shines out of the gem in a 30-foot emanation, forcing hostile creatures in the area to make a DC 26 Fortitude check save or be Blinded for 1 round.
